\documentclass{siddur}

% Custom page numbering to yield 163.a, 163.b, etc.
\renewcommand{\thepage}{163.\alph{page}}

% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  WE ARE A PEOPLE in whom the past endures, \\
in whom the present is inconceivable without moments gone by. \\
The Exodus lasted a moment, a moment enduring forever. \\
What happened once upon a time happens all the time.%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  A THOUGHT has blown the market place away. \\
There is a song on the wind and joy in the trees. \\
Shabbat arrives in the world, \\
scattering a song in the silence of the night: \\
Eternity utters a day.%
}

\newcommand{\blockC}{%
  More than the Jewish People has kept Shabbat, Shabbat has kept the Jewish People. Ahad Ha-Am%
}

% --- DOCUMENT BODY ---
\begin{document}
\blockA
\vspace{1em}
